hero.title: Barcelona, Orchestrated.
hero.description: Restore the city command surface you were building: live taxis, hotel discovery, maps, analytics, and a luxury visual language tuned for desktop and mobile.
hero.status: Night mode: Gold on black. Sunny mode: gold on warm stone.

features.title: Services running on one civic operating layer
features.description: A premium landing experience built around real-time mobility, hospitality, and city signals.

taxis.title: Real-time Taxis
taxis.body: Monitor fleet health, pickup density, and dispatch availability across the city in one live canvas.

hotels.title: Smart Hotel Discovery
hotels.body: Blend availability, district intelligence, and premium inventory with a fast spatial search flow.

analytics.title: City Analytics
analytics.body: Surface demand patterns, occupancy, and operational KPIs in seconds with executive-grade visuals.

showcase.title: Spatial Search
showcase.subtitle: Semantic search over the city grid
showcase.placeholder: Boutique hotels near Eixample with fast taxi pickup
showcase.result: Best match: Eixample North - 2 min taxi ETA

mobileMock.title: Citizen Experience
mobileMock.body: A phone-first arrival flow with a premium card stack, live status, and clear handoff between map, taxi, and hotel moments.

footer.about: Barcelona City OS is a luxury civic platform for dispatch, hotels, mobility, and live urban intelligence.

auth.loginBody: Sign in to recover your command center, live dashboards, and premium city workflows.
auth.signupBody: Open a new operator account for taxis, hotels, and analytics.
auth.name: Full name
